title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Max Fashion

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Max Fashion
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Fashion! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Fashion:
Max Fashion is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion!
